# AiDads — aidads.com

Justin Brown's personal site — showcases 17 AI companies and the venture factory model.

## What is AiDads?

AiDads is a venture factory operated by Justin Brown. From a single laptop, Justin builds and runs 17 AI-powered companies using 91 autonomous AI agents. The site showcases how one person can build and operate multiple AI-powered businesses simultaneously using AI agents as co-CEOs.

## Companies

The portfolio spans four categories:

- **Products**: DropClose, CallTwin, BuiltMonthly, GetPaid.Video, AdzForge, BlitzGTM, AffixedAI
- **Platforms**: JarvisSDK, JarvisBrain, JarvisCRM, YourFeeds.ai
- **Partnerships**: CodeItRight, The Performance Edge, PureUSPeptide, ThePeptideAI
- **Lead Gen**: Goliath Roofing, TurfGrass Solutions

## Links

- Website: https://aidads.com
- Ecosystem: https://aidads.com/ecosystem
- Partnerships: https://aidads.com/partnerships
